name: Carrot-Tofu Soup with Dill
recipeIngredient: 10.5 oz soft silken tofu (regular or low-fat)
1 scant tablespoon chopped fresh dill (or 1 teaspoon dried)
1 teaspoon red miso, or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine carrots, water, salt, and onion in a medium saucepan.
2. Cook over medium heat until carrots are tender, about 15 minutes.
3. Scoop carrots and onion out of the cooking water; place in a blender or food processor.
4. Add tofu, dill, miso, white pepper, and a small amount of cooking water; puree.
5. Return puree to cooking water, mix well, and serve immediately.
Makes 4-6 servings.
Per serving: 129 Calories / 16g Protein / 2g Fat / 21g Carbohydrate / 0 Cholesterol / 730mg Sodium / 4g Fiber.
